text: Application Load Balancer (ALB) - Rules @ tpsusamcrtitie @) ssvancanei * Rules direct connections which arrive at a listener * Processed in priority order e Default rule = catchall * Rule Conditions: host-header, http-header, http-request- method, path-pattern, query-string & source-ip e Actions : forward, redirect, fixed-response, authenticate- oidc & authenticate-cognito
